chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3058 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter For orders on M.A. No.2611/2026 (U/A) For orders on M.A. No.2111/2026 (Return of surety) ----------------------------------------------------- 19.02.2026 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ---------------------------------------------------- Along with urgent application, application for return of surety has been moved by the applicant/surety. It appears that protective bail for a period of 10 days was granted to applicant/accused Ali son of Imran Shafiq by this Court vide order dated 06.11.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. As per Nazir’s endorsement one Amir son of Dadan furnished surety by way of depositing cash amount Rs.50,000/-. Learned counsel for applicant/surety submits that after grant of protective bail, applicant/accused surrendered before learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-X, Hyderabad and was admitted to post arrest bail vide order dated 05.12.2025, hence the surety furnished is no more required. Certified copy of order dated 05.12.2025 has been placed on record. Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid order has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed.

In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
